[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 1010001 3
4 1010100 3
5 0000100 1
6 1101111 6
7 1100101 4

01 1111011 6
12 1111111 a
23 0010100 2
34 1111111 a
45 1101111 6 match 6
56 1111101 6
67 1110011 5
70 0101110 4

02 1111011 6
13 1010100 3 match 4
24 0011110 4
35 1101111 6 match 6
46 1101101 5
57 1110001 4
60 1111111 a
71 0101111 5
